examples: Harry: Vigilantly Give me my 26 wand, Tom.
Poolside mothers slather their children in buckets of sun block and vigilantly watch for the first signs of sunburn.
To ensure that our ideas are clear, we must vigilantly attend to the relationship between any given idea and its object.
If patients on Lantus did have an increased risk, the solution might be to screen them more vigilantly.
Tax proceeds could finally give poor countries the resources to administer vigilantly the business of discovering and displaying cultural heritage.
